name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card
title: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card (Chase)
text:
Card: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card (Chase)
Pros: Earn 10 points per dollar spent on purchases at IHG Hotels and Resorts (in addition to the points you'll earn on stays as an IHG elite member),Enjoy IHG-related perks, including automatic Platinum Elite status for as long as you’re a cardholder, every fourth reward night free on stays of at least four nights when you redeem points and an anniversary night worth up to 40,000 points after every account anniversary,Get up to $50 in United TravelBank Cash each calendar year,Get an up to $120 statement credit for a NEXUS, Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee every four years
Cons: Redemption options outside of IHG stays provide low value,Poor transfer rates to airline partners
Why we chose it: For a $99 annual fee, the IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card can be an asset in the wallets of IHG loyalists. While the earning potential outside of IHG is relatively low, perks such as the fourth reward night free when redeeming IHG points and an anniversary night after each account anniversary can add a lot of value to any traveler’s wallet. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: IHG loyalists can benefit from carrying this card since it offers a variety of useful benefits. Cardholders receive complimentary IHG Platinum Elite status, a discount when buying IHG points and every fourth night costs zero points when redeeming points for stays of four nights or longer. Add in an anniversary night worth up to 40,000 points after each account anniversary, and you’re looking at potentially hundreds of dollars in value each year.
Annual fee: $99
Rewards: 3 - 26X points
Intro bonus: Earn 175,000 Bonus Points after spending $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening
Points valuation: 0.5
APR: 19.24% - 27.74% Variable,19.24% - 27.74% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99%
Benefits: As long as you remain an IHG One Rewards Premier Cardmember, you will receive automatic Platinum Elite Status at IHG hotels. Earned each account anniversary year with a current point redemption cap of 40,000 points. Earn a $100 statement credit and 10,000 bonus points after spending $20,000 each calendar year. When you redeem points for a consecutive four-night IHG hotel stay, receive a fourth Reward Night free. Receive a statement credit of up to $100 ($120 starting 10/1/24) every four years as reimbursement for the application fee for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck or NEXUS. Receive up to $50 United TravelBank Cash each calendar year after registering your IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card with your MileagePlus account. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, providing unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fee and lower service fees on eligible orders. Receive a $10 off discount each calendar quarter on one eligible non-restaurant order on DoorDash. Reimburses up to $100 a day for 3 days for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours. Coverage for luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier up to $3,000 per passenger. Covers new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft. Reimbursed up to $5,000 per person and $10,000 per trip if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather, and other covered situations. As long as you remain an IHG One Rewards Premier Cardmember, you will receive automatic Platinum Elite Status at IHG hotels. Earned each account anniversary year with a current point redemption cap of 40,000 points. Earn a $100 statement credit and 10,000 bonus points after spending $20,000 each calendar year. When you redeem points for a consecutive four-night IHG hotel stay, receive a fourth Reward Night free. Receive a statement credit of up to $100 ($120 starting 10/1/24) every four years as reimbursement for the application fee for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck or NEXUS. Receive up to $50 United TravelBank Cash each calendar year after registering your IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card with your MileagePlus account. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, providing unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fee and lower service fees on eligible orders. Receive a $10 off discount each calendar quarter on one eligible non-restaurant order on DoorDash. Reimburses up to $100 a day for 3 days for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours. Coverage for luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier up to $3,000 per passenger. Covers new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft. Reimbursed up to $5,000 per person and $10,000 per trip if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather, and other covered situations.
Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/ihg-premier-credit-card-review/
